roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/MO PC 1385:VICTIM UNAVAILABLE /SATERM/CTORD:GPS ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS HEREBY TERMINATED PENDING SUCCESSFUL RETURN OF CHARGING EQUIPMENT TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/OR/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/WA/OBEY/SAORD/SA1:JOCELYNE LACERNA/SAORD2/SA2:575 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF & POSS GPS REMOVAL/DOP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
